PaperAssignment.statement: Type u_1 \to Type u_2 \to Type (max u_2 u_1)

PaperFractionalFeasible.statement: {Advertiser : Type u_1} \to {Query : Type u_2} \to [Fintype Advertiser] \to [Fintype Query] \to PaperInstance Advertiser Query \to (Advertiser \to Query \to ℝ) \to Prop

PaperInstance.statement: Type u_1 \to Type u_2 \to Type (max u_1 u_2)

PaperSmallBidsLimitFamily.statement: (Advertiser : Type u_1) \to [Fintype Advertiser] \to [Nonempty Advertiser] \to [DecidableEq Advertiser] \to Type u_1

paperBalanceScore.statement: {Advertiser : Type u_1} \to {Query : Type u_2} \to [Fintype Query] \to [DecidableEq Advertiser] \to PaperInstance Advertiser Query \to PaperAssignment Advertiser Query \to Advertiser \to Query \to ℝ

paperCanAssign.statement: {Advertiser : Type u_1} \to {Query : Type u_2} \to [Fintype Query] \to [DecidableEq Advertiser] \to PaperInstance Advertiser Query \to PaperAssignment Advertiser Query \to Query \to Advertiser \to Prop

paperFeasible.statement: {Advertiser : Type u_1} \to {Query : Type u_2} \to [Fintype Query] \to [DecidableEq Advertiser] \to PaperInstance Advertiser Query \to PaperAssignment Advertiser Query \to Prop

paperFractionalRevenue.statement: {Advertiser : Type u_1} \to {Query : Type u_2} \to [Fintype Advertiser] \to [Fintype Query] \to PaperInstance Advertiser Query \to (Advertiser \to Query \to ℝ) \to ℝ

paperIsBalanceChoice.statement: {Advertiser : Type u_1} \to {Query : Type u_2} \to [Fintype Advertiser] \to [Fintype Query] \to [DecidableEq Advertiser] \to PaperInstance Advertiser Query \to PaperAssignment Advertiser Query \to Query \to Advertiser \to Prop

paperRevenue.statement: {Advertiser : Type u_1} \to {Query : Type u_2} \to [Fintype Query] \to PaperInstance Advertiser Query \to PaperAssignment Advertiser Query \to ℝ

paperSlotsPerPageDistinct.statement: {Advertiser : Type u_1} \to {Query : Type u_2} \to (Slot : Query \to Type u_3) \to PaperAssignment Advertiser ((q : Query) × Slot q) \to Prop

paperSmallBids.statement: {Advertiser : Type u_1} \to {Query : Type u_2} \to PaperInstance Advertiser Query \to ℝ \to Prop

paperSpend.statement: {Advertiser : Type u_1} \to {Query : Type u_2} \to [Fintype Query] \to [DecidableEq Advertiser] \to PaperInstance Advertiser Query \to PaperAssignment Advertiser Query \to Advertiser \to ℝ

section6_availability_theorem8_finite_ex.statement: \forall {Advertiser : Type u_1} {Query : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype Advertiser] [inst_1 : Nonempty Advertiser] [inst_2 : Fintype Query] [inst_3 : DecidableEq Advertiser] [inst_4 : DecidableEq Query] (I : PaperInstance Advertiser Query) (available : Advertiser \to Query \to Prop) [inst_5 : (a : Advertiser) \to (q : Query) \to Decidable (available a q)], NonnegativeBids I \to \forall (hbudget : PositiveBudgets I) (history : List Query), Nodup \to historyFinset history = univ \to \forall {epsilon : ℝ}, 0 \le epsilon \to epsilon \le 1 \to paperSmallBids I epsilon \to paperMsvvRatio * (withAvailability I available).offlineOptimumValue ⋯ \le (withAvailability I available).revenue ((withAvailability I available).runAssignment (withAvailability I available).balanceChoiceRule history) + epsilon * (exp 1 + 1) * \sum q, (withAvailability I available).maxBidForQuery q

section6_click_through_rates_theorem8_fi.statement: \forall {Advertiser : Type u_1} {Query : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype Advertiser] [inst_1 : Nonempty Advertiser] [inst_2 : Fintype Query] [inst_3 : DecidableEq Advertiser] [inst_4 : DecidableEq Query] (I : PaperInstance Advertiser Query) (ctr : Advertiser \to Query \to ℝ), (\forall (a : Advertiser) (q : Query), 0 \le ctr a q) \to (\forall (a : Advertiser) (q : Query), ctr a q \le 1) \to NonnegativeBids I \to \forall (hbudget : PositiveBudgets I) (history : List Query), Nodup \to historyFinset history = univ \to \forall {epsilon : ℝ}, 0 \le epsilon \to epsilon \le 1 \to paperSmallBids I epsilon \to paperMsvvRatio * (withClickThroughRates I ctr).offlineOptimumValue ⋯ \le (withClickThroughRates I ctr).revenue ((withClickThroughRates I ctr).runAssignment (withClickThroughRates I ctr).balanceChoiceRule history) + epsilon * (exp 1 + 1) * \sum q, (withClickThroughRates I ctr).maxBidForQuery q

section6_different_budgets_and_nonexhaus.statement: \forall {Advertiser : Type u_1} {Query : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype Advertiser] [inst_1 : Nonempty Advertiser] [inst_2 : Fintype Query] [inst_3 : DecidableEq Advertiser] [inst_4 : DecidableEq Query] (I : PaperInstance Advertiser Query), NonnegativeBids I \to \forall (hbudget : PositiveBudgets I) (history : List Query), Nodup \to historyFinset history = univ \to \forall {epsilon : ℝ}, 0 \le epsilon \to epsilon \le 1 \to paperSmallBids I epsilon \to paperMsvvRatio * offlineOptimumValue I ⋯ \le paperRevenue I (runAssignment I (balanceChoiceRule I) history) + epsilon * (exp 1 + 1) * \sum q, maxBidForQuery I q

section6_effective_bids_theorem8_finite_.statement: \forall {Advertiser : Type u_1} {Query : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype Advertiser] [inst_1 : Nonempty Advertiser] [inst_2 : Fintype Query] [inst_3 : DecidableEq Advertiser] [inst_4 : DecidableEq Query] (I : PaperInstance Advertiser Query) (effectiveBid : Advertiser \to Query \to ℝ), (\forall (a : Advertiser) (q : Query), 0 \le effectiveBid a q) \to \forall (hbudget : PositiveBudgets I) (history : List Query), Nodup \to historyFinset history = univ \to \forall {epsilon : ℝ}, 0 \le epsilon \to epsilon \le 1 \to (\forall (a : Advertiser) (q : Query), effectiveBid a q \le epsilon * budget a) \to paperMsvvRatio * (withEffectiveBids I effectiveBid).offlineOptimumValue ⋯ \le (withEffectiveBids I effectiveBid).revenue ((withEffectiveBids I effectiveBid).runAssignment (withEffectiveBids I effectiveBid).balanceChoiceRule history) + epsilon * (exp 1 + 1) * \sum q, (withEffectiveBids I effectiveBid).maxBidForQuery q

section6_multiple_slots_distinct_choice_.statement: \forall {Advertiser : Type u_1} {Query : Type u_2} {Slot : Query \to Type u_3} [inst : Fintype Advertiser] [inst_1 : Fintype ((q : Query) × Slot q)] [inst_2 : DecidableEq Advertiser] [inst_3 : DecidableEq ((q : Query) × Slot q)] (I : PaperInstance Advertiser Query) (history : List ((q : Query) × Slot q)), paperSlotsPerPageDistinct Slot ((withSlots I Slot).runAssignment (withSlotsDistinctChoice Slot (withSlots I Slot).balanceChoiceRule) history)

section6_multiple_slots_theorem8_finite_.statement: \forall {Advertiser : Type u_1} {Query : Type u_2} {Slot : Query \to Type u_3} [inst : Fintype Advertiser] [inst_1 : Nonempty Advertiser] [inst_2 : Fintype ((q : Query) × Slot q)] [inst_3 : DecidableEq Advertiser] [inst_4 : DecidableEq ((q : Query) × Slot q)] (I : PaperInstance Advertiser Query), NonnegativeBids I \to \forall (hbudget : PositiveBudgets I) (history : List ((q : Query) × Slot q)), Nodup \to historyFinset history = univ \to \forall {epsilon : ℝ}, 0 \le epsilon \to epsilon \le 1 \to paperSmallBids I epsilon \to paperMsvvRatio * (withSlots I Slot).offlineOptimumValue ⋯ \le paperRevenue (withSlots I Slot) ((withSlots I Slot).runAssignment (withSlots I Slot).balanceChoiceRule history) + epsilon * (exp 1 + 1) * \sum q, (withSlots I Slot).maxBidForQuery q

section6_next_highest_bid_alive.statement: {Advertiser : Type u_1} \to {Query : Type u_2} \to [Fintype Advertiser] \to [DecidableEq Advertiser] \to PaperInstance Advertiser Query \to (alive : Advertiser \to Query \to Prop) \to [(a : Advertiser) \to (q : Query) \to Decidable (alive a q)] \to Advertiser \to Query \to ℝ

section6_next_highest_bid_alive_theorem8.statement: \forall {Advertiser : Type u_1} {Query : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype Advertiser] [inst_1 : Nonempty Advertiser] [inst_2 : Fintype Query] [inst_3 : DecidableEq Advertiser] [inst_4 : DecidableEq Query] (I : PaperInstance Advertiser Query) (alive : Advertiser \to Query \to Prop) [inst_5 : (a : Advertiser) \to (q : Query) \to Decidable (alive a q)] (hbudget : PositiveBudgets I) (history : List Query), Nodup \to historyFinset history = univ \to \forall {epsilon : ℝ}, 0 \le epsilon \to epsilon \le 1 \to (\forall (a : Advertiser) (q : Query), section6_next_highest_bid_alive I alive a q \le epsilon * budget a) \to paperMsvvRatio * (withEffectiveBids I (section6_next_highest_bid_alive I alive)).offlineOptimumValue ⋯ \le paperRevenue (withEffectiveBids I (section6_next_highest_bid_alive I alive)) ((withEffectiveBids I (section6_next_highest_bid_alive I alive)).runAssignment (withEffectiveBids I (section6_next_highest_bid_alive I alive)).balanceChoiceRule history) + epsilon * (exp 1 + 1) * \sum q, (withEffectiveBids I (section6_next_highest_bid_alive I alive)).maxBidForQuery q

section6_next_highest_bid_all.statement: {Advertiser : Type u_1} \to {Query : Type u_2} \to [Fintype Advertiser] \to [DecidableEq Advertiser] \to PaperInstance Advertiser Query \to Advertiser \to Query \to ℝ

section6_next_highest_bid_all_theorem8_f.statement: \forall {Advertiser : Type u_1} {Query : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype Advertiser] [inst_1 : Nonempty Advertiser] [inst_2 : Fintype Query] [inst_3 : DecidableEq Advertiser] [inst_4 : DecidableEq Query] (I : PaperInstance Advertiser Query) (hbudget : PositiveBudgets I) (history : List Query), Nodup \to historyFinset history = univ \to \forall {epsilon : ℝ}, 0 \le epsilon \to epsilon \le 1 \to (\forall (a : Advertiser) (q : Query), section6_next_highest_bid_all I a q \le epsilon * budget a) \to paperMsvvRatio * (withEffectiveBids I (section6_next_highest_bid_all I)).offlineOptimumValue ⋯ \le paperRevenue (withEffectiveBids I (section6_next_highest_bid_all I)) ((withEffectiveBids I (section6_next_highest_bid_all I)).runAssignment (withEffectiveBids I (section6_next_highest_bid_all I)).balanceChoiceRule history) + epsilon * (exp 1 + 1) * \sum q, (withEffectiveBids I (section6_next_highest_bid_all I)).maxBidForQuery q

section6_page_top_balance_theorem8_finit.statement: \forall {Advertiser : Type u_1} {Query : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype Advertiser] [inst_1 : Nonempty Advertiser] [inst_2 : Fintype Query] [inst_3 : DecidableEq Advertiser] [inst_4 : DecidableEq Query] (I : PaperInstance Advertiser Query) (slots : Query \to ℕ), NonnegativeBids I \to \forall (hbudget : PositiveBudgets I) (history : List Query), Nodup \to historyFinset history = univ \to \forall {epsilon : ℝ}, 0 \le epsilon \to epsilon \le 1 \to paperSmallBids I epsilon \to paperMsvvRatio * pageOfflineOptimumValue I slots ⋯ \le pageRevenue I (runPageAssignment I slots (pageTopBalanceRule I slots) history) + epsilon * (exp 1 + 1) * pageHistoryMaxBidSum I slots history

section8_weighted_bids_theorem8_finite_e.statement: \forall {Advertiser : Type u_1} {Query : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype Advertiser] [inst_1 : Nonempty Advertiser] [inst_2 : Fintype Query] [inst_3 : DecidableEq Advertiser] [inst_4 : DecidableEq Query] (I : PaperInstance Advertiser Query) (weight : Advertiser \to ℝ), (\forall (a : Advertiser), 0 \le weight a) \to (\forall (a : Advertiser), weight a \le 1) \to NonnegativeBids I \to \forall (hbudget : PositiveBudgets I) (history : List Query), Nodup \to historyFinset history = univ \to \forall {epsilon : ℝ}, 0 \le epsilon \to epsilon \le 1 \to paperSmallBids I epsilon \to paperMsvvRatio * (withAdvertiserWeights I weight).offlineOptimumValue ⋯ \le (withAdvertiserWeights I weight).revenue ((withAdvertiserWeights I weight).runAssignment (withAdvertiserWeights I weight).balanceChoiceRule history) + epsilon * (exp 1 + 1) * \sum q, (withAdvertiserWeights I weight).maxBidForQuery q

\forall {Advertiser : Type u_1} {Query : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype Advertiser] [inst_1 : Nonempty Advertiser] [inst_2 : Fintype Query] [inst_3 : DecidableEq Advertiser] [inst_4 : DecidableEq Query] (I : PaperInstance Advertiser Query) (weight : Advertiser \to ℝ), (\forall (a : Advertiser), 0 \le weight a) \to NonnegativeBids I \to \forall (hbudget : PositiveBudgets I) (history : List Query), Nodup \to historyFinset history = univ \to \forall {epsilon : ℝ}, 0 \le epsilon \to epsilon \le 1 \to (\forall (a : Advertiser) (q : Query), weight a * bid a q \le epsilon * budget a) \to paperMsvvRatio * (withAdvertiserWeights I weight).offlineOptimumValue ⋯ \le (withAdvertiserWeights I weight).revenue ((withAdvertiserWeights I weight).runAssignment (withAdvertiserWeights I weight).balanceChoiceRule history) + epsilon * (exp 1 + 1) * \sum q, (withAdvertiserWeights I weight).maxBidForQuery q

theorem8_balance_msvv_competitive_of_sma.statement: \forall {Advertiser : Type u_1} [inst : Fintype Advertiser] [inst_1 : Nonempty Advertiser] [inst_2 : DecidableEq Advertiser] (F : PaperSmallBidsLimitFamily Advertiser), paperMsvvRatio * optLimit \le revenueLimit

theorem8_finite_explicit_error.statement: \forall {Advertiser : Type u_1} {Query : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype Advertiser] [inst_1 : Nonempty Advertiser] [inst_2 : Fintype Query] [inst_3 : DecidableEq Advertiser] [inst_4 : DecidableEq Query] (I : PaperInstance Advertiser Query), NonnegativeBids I \to \forall (hbudget : PositiveBudgets I) (history : List Query), Nodup \to historyFinset history = univ \to \forall {epsilon : ℝ}, 0 \le epsilon \to epsilon \le 1 \to paperSmallBids I epsilon \to paperMsvvRatio * offlineOptimumValue I ⋯ \le paperRevenue I (runAssignment I (balanceChoiceRule I) history) + epsilon * (exp 1 + 1) * \sum q, maxBidForQuery I q

theorem9CappedNormalizedRevenue.statement: (N : ℕ) \to theorem9IntegralPrefixAlgorithm N \to Perm (Fin N) \to ℝ

theorem9FeasiblePrefixRuleFamily.statement: (Algorithm : ℕ \to Type u_1) \to [(N : ℕ) \to Fintype (Algorithm N)] \to [(N : ℕ) \to DecidableEq (Algorithm N)] \to Type u_1

theorem9_capped_normalized_revenue_eq_pr.statement: \forall (N : ℕ) (algorithm : theorem9IntegralPrefixAlgorithm N) (permutation : Perm (Fin N)), theorem9CappedNormalizedRevenue N algorithm permutation = (\sum bidder, min 1 (\sum round, prefixAllocation algorithm (theorem9ObservedPrefix N permutation round) round (permutation bidder))) / ↑N

theorem9_no_randomized_feasible_prefix_r.statement: \forall {Algorithm : ℕ \to Type u_1} [inst : (N : ℕ) \to Fintype (Algorithm N)] [inst_1 : (N : ℕ) \to DecidableEq (Algorithm N)] (C : theorem9FeasiblePrefixRuleFamily Algorithm) (delta : ℝ), 0 < delta \to \exists N0, \forall (N : ℕ), N0 \le N \to \forall (randomizedAlgorithm : PMF (Algorithm N)), \lnot\forall (permutation : Perm (Fin N)), paperMsvvRatio + delta < pmfExp randomizedAlgorithm fun algorithm  =>  normalizedRevenue C N algorithm permutation

theorem9_no_randomized_integral_prefix_a.statement: \forall (delta : ℝ), 0 < delta \to \exists N0, \forall (N : ℕ), N0 \le N \to \forall (randomizedAlgorithm : PMF (theorem9IntegralPrefixAlgorithm N)), \lnot\forall (permutation : Perm (Fin N)), paperMsvvRatio + delta < pmfExp randomizedAlgorithm fun algorithm  =>  theorem9CappedNormalizedRevenue N algorithm permutation

theorem9_no_randomized_online_algorithm_.statement: \forall (delta : ℝ), 0 < delta \to \exists N0, \forall (N : ℕ), N0 \le N \to \forall (randomizedAlgorithm : theorem9RandomizedOnlineAlgorithm N), \lnot\forall (permutation : Perm (Fin N)), paperMsvvRatio + delta < pmfExp randomizedAlgorithm fun algorithm  =>  theorem9CappedNormalizedRevenue N algorithm permutation
